# Experiment 02: Cognitive Task Battery

## Goal

Verify that SubstanceNet maintains stable κ-plateau (R ≈ 0.41) across diverse cognitive tasks, demonstrating task-independent critical regime. Compare with v3.1.1 reference (R = 0.9563, saturated).

## Methodology

**Model:** SubstanceNet with num_classes=2, abstract_dim=3. Fresh model per task. Seed=42 (reset per task for identical initialization).

**Tasks (10 types):** logic, memory, categorization, analogy, spatial, raven, numerical, verbal, emotional, insight. Generated by `src/utils.generate_synthetic_cognitive_data()`.

**Training:** 100 epochs per task, batch_size=32, Adam optimizer lr=0.001. TemporalConsciousnessController in 'stream' mode monitors R phases.

**Processing mode:** Cognitive (`mode='cognitive'`). Input: flat tensor → cognitive_input (Linear(64,576)+ReLU) → reshape [B,9,64] → full pipeline.

**Metrics:** Test accuracy (256 samples), reflexivity R, phase coherence, abstract variance. Controller phase classification: subcritical (<0.30), critical (0.30–0.50), supercritical (0.50–0.80), saturated (>0.80).

**R-targeting:** consciousness_loss = (MSE(ψ_C, P̂[ψ_C]) − 1.44)², targeting R = 1/(1+1.44) ≈ 0.41.

## Results

| Task | Accuracy | R | Phase | Abstract var |
|------|----------|---|-------|-------------|
| logic | 1.0000 | 0.4088 | critical | 21.3 |
| memory | 1.0000 | 0.4078 | critical | 29.5 |
| categorization | 1.0000 | 0.4098 | critical | 29.4 |
| analogy | 1.0000 | 0.4089 | critical | 28.7 |
| spatial | 1.0000 | 0.4107 | critical | 24.4 |
| raven | 0.9844 | 0.4090 | critical | 11.3 |
| numerical | 1.0000 | 0.4085 | critical | 24.2 |
| verbal | 1.0000 | 0.4085 | critical | 27.0 |
| emotional | 1.0000 | 0.4092 | critical | 25.9 |
| insight | 1.0000 | 0.4090 | critical | 22.9 |
| **MEAN** | **0.9984** | **0.4090 ± 0.0007** | **all critical** | **24.5** |

**v3.1.1 reference:** Accuracy=0.9934, R=0.9563 (saturated)

## Conclusions

1. All 10 tasks in critical regime (R ∈ [0.35, 0.47]) — stable κ-plateau
2. R = 0.4090 ± 0.0007 — remarkably low variance across task types
3. Accuracy 99.84% — exceeds v3.1.1 reference (99.34%)
4. R converges to critical zone from epoch 1 and remains stable through 100 epochs
5. Abstract variance differentiates task complexity (raven=11.3 lowest, categorization=29.4 highest)
6. Raven matrices: lowest accuracy (98.44%) and lowest abstract variance — correctly identified as hardest task
